body: which makes it much easier to disentangle fluxes and assess if the radiation is correct
title: Add a container for radiative fluxes

body:
In main we need to have local (spatial and temporal) information to evaluate possible space-time-dependent radiative properties inside the solver. As a consequence, `LatitudeDependentAlbedo` (and `TabulatedAlbedo` would not work in combination with a `SkinTemperature` formulation).

This PR reworks a bit the flow of information (in addition to fixing a bug in `stateindex`) to allow passing radiative properties which are functions.

and also reintroduces a method which was needed but deleted in #502
title: Rework radiative properties

body:
After carefully revisiting 

https://github.com/NOAA-PSL/COARE-algorithm/blob/5b144cf6376a98b42200196d57ae40d791494abe/Matlab/COARE3.6/coare36vn_zrf_et.m#L703

and using MATLAB (yes, true story) me and @simone-silvestri found a mistake in how we had copied the momentum stability function.

(might be related to #493, https://github.com/taimoorsohail/ocean-ensembles/issues/22, ...)
title: Fix mistake in EdsonMomentumStabilityFunctions
